posts.author: jychoiSPH (Noelia Choi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
It would be nice if the Monday.com app had a feature to restrict download files.
(Only Admin account can set this feature.)

Due to company security concerns, I hope mobile app provide a feature restricting file download and only allow viewing.

The larger the company, the more user will want this feature.

I hope to see this feature soon!
